vocab.example: Being a bit of a social butterfly, I’m often drawn to the electric energy of crowded festivals on Saturday nights.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ồn nền/âm thanh môi trường
vocab.example: I find that a certain level of ambient noise in a coffee shop actually sharpens my focus more than total silence.

vocab.meaning: sự biệt lập/sự tĩnh lặng một mình (mang nghĩa tích cực)
vocab.example: I treasure the solitude of a mountain trail on Sunday mornings to escape the frantic pace of the city.
To counteract my hectic lifestyle during the week, I demand absolute stillness during my weekend retreats.

vocab.meaning: hồi phục năng lượng/nạp lại năng lượng
vocab.example: Noisy environments tend to drain me, so I prefer quiet spots where I can truly recharge my batteries.

vocab.meaning: đời sống ban đêm sôi động
vocab.example: Sometimes I crave the vibrant nightlife of the city, despite the deafening music and the throngs of people.

vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi nhịp độ (cuộc sống)
vocab.example: Visiting a bustling amusement park provides a much-needed change of pace from my repetitive office routine.

vocab.meaning: sự bình yên và tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: The peace and tranquility of a botanical garden offer the perfect backdrop for deep reflection.
Lively markets provide an incredible amount of sensory stimulation that I find quite exhilarating on my days off.
My ideal weekend involves finding a secluded beach where the only sound is the rhythmic crashing of waves.
